description_long: This is a single-story bungalow surrounded by a neatly trimmed hedge, featuring a front yard with a pathway leading to a covered porch and main entrance. The structure has a gable roof with a flat-roofed extension at the rear, and a driveway on one side leading to a garage. The front facade includes a prominent porch area with steps, flanked by landscaped greenery and a small garden. Large windows are distributed along the sides and rear, providing ample natural light to the interior. The backyard is spacious and open, bordered by the same hedge that encloses the property. The overall design is clean and modern, with a focus on outdoor living and curb appeal.
description: A modern single-story bungalow with a gable roof, covered porch, garage, and landscaped yard enclosed by a hedge. Large windows and a spacious backyard highlight its open, inviting design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, driveway, garage, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, side windows, and the driveway leading to the garage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat-roofed extension, large backyard, and back porch area.
description_view_3: Angled view from the rear corner, showing the backyard, hedge enclosure, and the side of the house with garden features.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
